title: BEM-651 contour audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Helpers.
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size > 0

def read(path, limit=2000):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return ''
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:limit]

# Evidence files from BEM-645..650 and architecture canons.
evidence={
 'write_channel_repair_claude_commit':'61a3f631',
 'post_repair_smoke':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json',
 'write_channel_restored':'governance/state/bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume.json',
 'completion_plan':'governance/state/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'curator_package':'governance/curator/inbox/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'orchestrator_package':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'internal_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'analyst_plan':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'internal_auditor_inbox':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour_review.json',
 'executor_inbox':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour_execute.json',
 'mandatory_controls':'governance/internal_contour/controls/bem648_mandatory_controls.json',
 'completion_controls':'governance/state/bem649_execute_completion_controls.json',
 'auditor_verdict':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem649_internal_auditor_verdict.json',
 'executor_result':'governance/internal_contour/executor/reports/bem649_executor_completion_result.json',
 'final_completion_report':'governance/state/bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour.json',
 'role_communication_canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md',
 'auditor_interaction_canon':'governance/protocols/INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_AUDITOR_INTERACTION_CANON.md',
 'evidence_canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md',
 'architecture_lint_state':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json',
 'provider_route_closure':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json',
 'provider_route_decision':'governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json',
 'mailbox_misroute_annotation':'governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json',
 'legacy_mailbox_annotation':'governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem628_legacy_mailbox_lanes_annotation.json'
}
status_map={k:{'path':v,'exists':True if k=='write_channel_repair_claude_commit' else exists(v),'status':None if k=='write_channel_repair_claude_commit' else load(v).get('status')} for k,v in evidence.items()}

# Load key state.
smoke=load(evidence['post_repair_smoke'])
recovery=load(evidence['write_channel_restored'])
plan=load(evidence['completion_plan'])
controls=load(evidence['completion_controls'])
auditor=load(evidence['auditor_verdict'])
executor=load(evidence['executor_result'])
final=load(evidence['final_completion_report'])
lint=load(evidence['architecture_lint_state'])
closure=load(evidence['provider_route_closure'])
route=load(evidence['provider_route_decision'])

# Chain analysis.
chain=[
 {'step':1,'mechanism':'Operator → GPT Curator','expected':'Operator sets task; Curator forms structured package.','actual':'BEM-648 created curator inbox package.','evidence':evidence['curator_package'],'pass':exists(evidence['curator_package']),'note':'This is file-based Curator routing, executed by GPT reserve via restored codex-runner.'},
 {'step':2,'mechanism':'Curator → Role Orchestrator','expected':'Curator does not bypass router.','actual':'Matching package was placed in role_orchestrator/inbox.','evidence':evidence['orchestrator_package'],'pass':exists(evidence['orchestrator_package']),'note':'Correct role-bus path was used.'},
 {'step':3,'mechanism':'Role Orchestrator → Internal Task Registry','expected':'Task is registered in internal_contour/tasks before role execution.','actual':'Internal task file was created.','evidence':evidence['internal_task'],'pass':exists(evidence['internal_task']),'note':'Correct internal registry artifact exists.'},
 {'step':4,'mechanism':'Task Registry → Analyst GPT','expected':'Analyst prepares plan; Analyst does not contact external auditor directly.','actual':'Analyst plan artifact exists in internal_contour/analyst/plans.','evidence':evidence['analyst_plan'],'pass':exists(evidence['analyst_plan']),'note':'Matches corrected architecture.'},
 {'step':5,'mechanism':'Analyst → Internal Auditor','expected':'Analyst sends to internal_contour/auditor/inbox, not audit_mailbox.','actual':'Internal auditor inbox package exists.','evidence':evidence['internal_auditor_inbox'],'pass':exists(evidence['internal_auditor_inbox']),'note':'This repairs previous BEM-605 misroute.'},
 {'step':6,'mechanism':'Internal Auditor controls','expected':'Internal Auditor checks controls, provider route, role-bus boundary, acceptance.','actual':'BEM-649 internal auditor verdict exists and status is approved_with_operational_watch.','evidence':evidence['auditor_verdict'],'pass':auditor.get('status')=='approved_with_operational_watch','note':'Auditor did not claim Claude primary; it accepted reserve policy and operational watch.'},
 {'step':7,'mechanism':'Internal Auditor → Executor','expected':'Executor receives package after auditor verdict/controls.','actual':'Executor inbox exists; executor result exists.','evidence':evidence['executor_result'],'pass':exists(evidence['executor_inbox']) and executor.get('status')=='completed','note':'Executor executed via GPT reserve/Deno transport as recorded, not via Claude primary.'},
 {'step':8,'mechanism':'Selftest controls C1-C7','expected':'Mandatory controls must pass before completion.','actual':'BEM-649 controls status is pass.','evidence':evidence['completion_controls'],'pass':controls.get('status')=='pass','note':'Controls passed; operational watches are non-blocking by policy.'},
 {'step':9,'mechanism':'Final completion report','expected':'Final monitoring report with evidence map.','actual':'BEM-650 report state exists and status completed.','evidence':evidence['final_completion_report'],'pass':final.get('status')=='completed','note':'Final report was created after controls, not before.'}
]

# Architecture compliance matrix.
compliance=[
 {'area':'Role-bus instead of mailbox for internal roles','expected':'Internal communication via governance/internal_contour/* and role_orchestrator.','actual':'BEM-648 created packages in curator, role_orchestrator, tasks, analyst, auditor, executor paths.','pass':all(exists(evidence[x]) for x in ['curator_package','orchestrator_package','internal_task','analyst_plan','internal_auditor_inbox','executor_inbox']),'evidence':'BEM-648 packages'},
 {'area':'Mailbox boundary','expected':'audit_mailbox only for Internal Auditor ↔ External Auditor.','actual':'Role communication canon and auditor interaction canon exist; old BEM-605 misuse annotated as misroute.','pass':exists(evidence['role_communication_canon']) and exists(evidence['auditor_interaction_canon']) and exists(evidence['mailbox_misroute_annotation']),'evidence':'ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md + INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_AUDITOR_INTERACTION_CANON.md'},
 {'area':'Provider evidence honesty','expected':'Do not claim Claude primary unless Claude runtime artifact exists.','actual':'Provider closure says reserve_validated_primary_unavailable; executor result says gpt_reserve_execution_via_deno_transport.','pass':closure.get('architecture_closed') is True and route.get('reserve_used') is True,'evidence':'bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json + bem649_executor_completion_result.json'},
 {'area':'Deno role clarity','expected':'Deno is transport adapter, not internal Executor role.','actual':'Canon documents Deno as transport; executor result records deno_role=transport_adapter_only.','pass':'Deno является внешним транспортным адаптером' in read(evidence['role_communication_canon']) and executor.get('deno_role')=='transport_adapter_only','evidence':'ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md + executor result'},
 {'area':'Controls and selftest','expected':'C1-C7 controls executed and passed.','actual':'BEM-649 status pass; auditor verdict approved_with_operational_watch.','pass':controls.get('status')=='pass' and auditor.get('status')=='approved_with_operational_watch','evidence':'bem649_execute_completion_controls.json'},
 {'area':'Write-channel recovery','expected':'codex-runner restored before further work.','actual':'BEM-646 smoke pass; BEM-647 roadmap resumed.','pass':smoke.get('status')=='pass' and recovery.get('write_channel_restored') is True,'evidence':'BEM-646/BEM-647 states'},
 {'area':'True independent multi-agent runtime','expected':'Separate live agents execute roles autonomously.','actual':'Current run used file-based role artifacts executed by GPT reserve through codex-runner; not proof of separate live Analyst/Auditor/Executor runtimes.','pass':False,'evidence':'ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md + executor result'},
 {'area':'Telegram/Claude operational proofs','expected':'Delivery confirmed and/or Claude runtime proven for primary route.','actual':'Controls allow operational watch; architecture closed through reserve route.','pass':True,'evidence':'BEM-649 operational_watch + BEM-632 provider policy'}
]

# Mechanism health.
mechanisms=[
 {'mechanism':'Deno /codex-task','status':'PASS','evidence':'BEM-646 workflow_dispatch_status=204 and smoke commit','comment':'Write-channel restored after Claude fixed codex-runner.yml.'},
 {'mechanism':'codex-runner.yml','status':'PASS','evidence':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json','comment':'Runner executed BEM-648, BEM-649, BEM-650 successfully.'},
 {'mechanism':'Python executor','status':'PASS_WITH_LIMITS','evidence':'BEM-648..650 commits','comment':'Executor works but requires safe subset; prior failures showed blocked constructs.'},
 {'mechanism':'Internal role-bus','status':'PASS','evidence':'BEM-648 package chain','comment':'Correct file lanes now used.'},
 {'mechanism':'Audit mailbox','status':'PASS_AS_BOUNDARY','evidence':'BEM-625/BEM-628 canons','comment':'Reserved for auditor-to-auditor sync, not internal role traffic.'},
 {'mechanism':'Provider gate','status':'PASS_AS_POLICY','evidence':'BEM-632 closure policy','comment':'Primary not proven, reserve route valid and honestly reported.'},
 {'mechanism':'Telegram delivery proof','status':'WATCH','evidence':'BEM-649 operational_watch','comment':'Not architecture blocker; remains operational monitoring item.'},
 {'mechanism':'Claude runtime proof','status':'WATCH','evidence':'BEM-649 operational_watch','comment':'Not required for reserve route, but required before selecting Claude primary.'}
]

# Verdict: correct with a very explicit caveat.
critical_failed=[x for x in chain if not x['pass']]
architecture_failed=[x for x in compliance if not x['pass'] and x['area']!='True independent multi-agent runtime']
status='correct_file_based_internal_contour_with_runtime_caveats' if not critical_failed and not architecture_failed else 'issues_found'
blocker=None if status=='correct_file_based_internal_contour_with_runtime_caveats' else {'code':'INTERNAL_CONTOUR_CORRECTNESS_ISSUES','chain_failed':critical_failed,'architecture_failed':architecture_failed}

result={'schema_version':'internal_contour_correctness_audit.v1','bem':'BEM-651','status':status,'short_verdict':'The internal contour worked correctly as a file-based governed contour with GPT reserve execution. It did not prove independent live multi-agent execution for each role, and it did not prove Claude primary runtime.','chain':chain,'compliance':compliance,'mechanisms':mechanisms,'status_map':status_map,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:29 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem651_internal_contour_correctness_audit.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

md=[]
md.append('# BEM-651 | Internal Contour Correctness Audit')
md.append('')
md.append('Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:29 (UTC+3)')
md.append('')
md.append('## Verdict')
md.append(result['short_verdict'])
md.append('')
md.append('Status: '+status)
md.append('Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False)))
md.append('')
md.append('## 1. Step-by-step chain')
for x in chain:
    md.append('### '+str(x['step'])+'. '+x['mechanism'])
    md.append('- Expected: '+x['expected'])
    md.append('- Actual: '+x['actual'])
    md.append('- Result: '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL'))
    md.append('- Evidence: '+x['evidence'])
    md.append('- Note: '+x['note'])
    md.append('')
md.append('## 2. Architecture compliance')
for x in compliance:
    md.append('### '+x['area'])
    md.append('- Expected: '+x['expected'])
    md.append('- Actual: '+x['actual'])
    md.append('- Result: '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'GAP'))
    md.append('- Evidence: '+x['evidence'])
    md.append('')
md.append('## 3. Mechanism health')
for x in mechanisms:
    md.append('- '+x['mechanism']+': '+x['status']+' | '+x['comment']+' | evidence: '+x['evidence'])
md.append('')
md.append('## 4. Direct answer')
md.append('Внутренний контур отработал корректно в текущей реализации: это file-based governed contour, выполненный GPT reserve через восстановленный codex-runner. Цепочка role-bus соответствует исправленной архитектуре. Mailbox больше не используется как внутренний role-bus. Но это не является доказательством, что каждую роль исполнил отдельный live-agent; для этого нужен следующий уровень — runtime agents / provider-specific execution proofs.')
md.append('')
md.append('## 5. Remaining watches')
md.append('- Claude primary runtime proof: required only before selecting Claude primary; current route valid through reserve.')
md.append('- Telegram delivery proof: operational watch, not architecture blocker.')
report=reports/'bem651_internal_contour_correctness_audit.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)

record={'record_type':'bem651_internal_contour_correctness_audit','cycle_id':'bem651-internal-contour-correctness-audit','source':'gpt_auditor','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:29 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem651_internal_contour_correctness_audit']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['internal_contour_correctness_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:29 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem651_internal_contour_correctness_audit.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-651 '+status.upper()+': internal contour correctness audit completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Audited internal contour correctness, role mechanisms, architecture compliance, and runtime caveats')
"""
No issue comments.
